description: Style NoteThe woman of style always chooses her trousers with care and scullers makes it all the easier with this classy pair. Designed with the choicest of fabrics, they make for perfect semi-formal wear when paired with a classic formal shirt and leather shoes.Product DetailsBeige full length pants with two pockets in front, one change pocket on the right front pocket, two pockets at the back and buttoned zipper closure on the front with loops at the waist bandMaterial and Care98% cotton and 2% lycraWash careHand wash or machine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDo not bleachFit and SizeSlim fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32”) is wearing a size 32
